name: perfectone-unit-verify
description: Open Plugin Beta for C coverage/assertion verification with PerfectOne, source-derived C design drafts, filtered KLEE/MC/DC, and Coding Agent residual reporting.

interface.shortDescription: C coverage/assertion beta through Docker-first PerfectOne
interface.longDescription: Spec2Test currently ships as a C-centered Open Plugin Beta. For C targets it connects Codex to the bundled Windows PerfectOne CLI through MCP for split/stub/harness generation, source-target-filtered Docker KLEE baseline execution, MC/DC coverage evidence, Windows local LLVM/lld-link residual native replay and coverage aggregation, source-derived C design drafts, testcase I/O evidence, UB/ASAN interpretation, coverage limit pages, and polished HTML reports. Docker Desktop is mandatory for the Windows C KLEE baseline and the MCP execution path attempts to start Docker Desktop when the daemon is not reachable. WSL execution is disabled in this plugin path due to artifact synchronization overhead. Non-C execution entrypoints are temporarily disabled in this beta deployment. Embedded C targets are not validated yet and require explicit toolchain context.
defaultPrompt: Use PerfectOne to verify C unit coverage for this project
Create C unit test designs from this specification
Generate C manual testcase seeds, decision tables, state-transition tests, boundary values, and equivalence partitions from a specification
Reverse-recommend a draft C unit design from source code
Generate a VSCode-template-based Unit Design Markdown document when no specification is provided
Temporarily block non-C verification entrypoints with non_c_temporarily_disabled
Generate decision table, state coverage, boundary value, equivalence partition, assertion, and oracle artifacts
Render an HTML review report for manual testcases, assertions, expected values, and traceability
Run C unit verification and improve uncovered functions
Run filtered KLEE and MC/DC for C before Codex residual repair
Use Windows PerfectOne CLI with Docker as the default Windows C KLEE runner
Detect OS-specific compiler, coverage, and embedded target toolchain setup requirements
Report missing PerfectOne CLI, Docker, compiler, coverage, and embedded target prerequisites without building them from the skill workflow
Diagnose C native unit coverage errors and repair residual coverage with the Coding Platform
Run AgentTest-style PM, Test Designer, Tester, and QA C unit coverage workflow
Create a polished standalone HTML unit verification report
